data.title: Create ui-designer return payload contract document
data.description:
Testing mode: GREEN. File: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-return-payload.md.

Create contract document that satisfies check-contract-schemas.sh validation and makes tests 3+4 from test-ui-designer-contract.sh pass.

Requirements:
- Heading: # Contract: ui-designer return payload
- ## Purpose section with non-empty content
- Defines CACHE_MISSING signal with actionable caller instructions (e.g. caller must run /dso:ui-discover before retrying)
- Defines scope_splits field with description of when populated (when pragmatic scope splitter triggers)

Acceptance criteria:
1. File exists at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-return-payload.md
2. head -1 outputs # Contract: ui-designer return payload
3. Contains ## Purpose section
4. Defines CACHE_MISSING with actionable caller instructions
5. Defines scope_splits field
6. bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-contract-schemas.sh plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-return-payload.md exits 0
7. Universal: bash tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh exits 0

Verify:
  bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-contract-schemas.sh plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-return-payload.md && echo schema valid
  bash tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-contract.sh 2>&1 | grep -cE '\.\.\. PASS$' | awk '{exit ($1 >= 2) ? 0 : 1}' && echo tests 3+4 PASS
